pr-evidence/require-cachet-repo-branding.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found README governance instructions did not mention the new branding gate; README was updated and GPT-5.5 approved with no findings.
what_changed: Required Cachet-branded GitHub repository description and cachet/kv-cache topics in governance readiness.
Hardened release-bundle validation to reject governance sidecars missing Cachet repository branding metadata.
Updated README release-governance instructions for the new branding gate.
pr-evidence/require-cachet-repo-branding.why: The open-source package goal requires distinct Cachet branding and discoverable repository metadata before release.
